questionHtml:
A group of 10 girls recorded the number of hours they spent watching television during a particular week. Their results are summarized in the box-and-whisker plot below.

The group of girls watched a total of 180 hours of television.

A group of 20 boys also recorded the number of hours they spent watching television that same week. Their results are summarized in the table below.

Find the mean number of hours that all 30 girls and boys spent watching television that week.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to find sum for combined group (may be seen in working)      (M1)

eg    180 + 420,  600

correct working        (A1)

eg    180 + 420 30 ,  600 30

mean = 20 (hours)    A1 N2

[3 marks]

meta.title: Find the mean number of hours that all 30 girls and boys spent watching television that week.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.3—Mean, median, mode. Mean of grouped data, standard deviation. Quartiles, IQR
